outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected; negative GEX environment amplifies price swings.
outlook.summary: Market is in a heavy negative gamma regime (-7.3B total). Dealers are short gamma, forcing them to sell into weakness and buy into strength, accelerating moves. Spot is testing the critical 650 support. A loss of 650 triggers a fast flush toward 640. Resistance is firm at 660-670.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: ELEVATED: Aggregate GEX deeply negative (-3.81B). Weekly/Monthly short gamma amplifies directional moves. Extreme PCR signals potential mean reversion squeeze.

Key battle zone between 6600 structural support and 6800 CALL resistance confluence.
